## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `flutter analyze` with no new errors
- [ ] I ran `flutter test` (or noted why tests are N/A)
- [ ] I updated **README** / **CHANGELOG** when user-visible behavior changed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets (`google-services.json`, API keys, `firebase_options` with real keys in public repos)
